description: A diverging bar chart: one bar per category whose length is a signed numerator-to-denominator template ratio, so bars extend left/right of zero and use a diverging orange-blue ramp; sorted descending by the ratio. The donor member filter was removed for data portability. Structurally compiled and not render-verified.

slots.purpose: Categorical dimension that defines one diverging bar per member.
slots.notes: One bar per member on rows; computed-sort orders these descending by the signed ratio calc.

slots.purpose: Continuous measure used as the signed ratio numerator.
slots.notes: Not on a shelf directly; feeds the template ratio numerator and is rewritten inside the formula on bind.

slots.purpose: Continuous measure used as the signed ratio denominator.
slots.notes: Not on a shelf directly; feeds the template ratio denominator and is rewritten inside the formula on bind.

calcs.notes: The signed numerator/denominator ratio drives bar length, diverging color, and computed-sort. Both placeholder refs rewrite on bind.

hazards.detail: Deviation family: the bar-length measure (Profit Ratio) can be NEGATIVE, so bars diverge left/right of a zero baseline and the color is a symmetric-around-zero diverging ramp. Bind a genuinely signed measure (a ratio, a variance, a delta) — a strictly-positive measure collapses to a one-sided ordinary bar and the diverging encoding wastes its palette.
The signed-ratio calc references two bindable base placeholders; rewriteFormulaFieldRefs resolves both on bind, and Gate #6 asserts both slots are bound.
